questions.question: What is the key danger of mutating reactive state inside the updated hook?
options: It runs asynchronously and misses the render cycle
It causes an infinite loop: mutation → re-render → updated → mutation
The DOM may not be fully painted when the hook runs
Vue throws a runtime warning and blocks the mutation

questions.question: What is a valid use case for onUpdated that cannot be replaced by watch or computed?
options: Syncing a third-party library or auto-scrolling after DOM changes
Deriving a computed sum from a reactive array
Sending an API request when a specific data property changes
Initializing component state on first render

questions.question: The onUpdated hook fires when ANY reactive state changes. What should you use to react to a specific property?
options: onUpdated with a guard condition (only valid approach)
watch or watchEffect targeting the specific property
